content.query:
-- create master key for this db





-- create databse scoped credential
---------------------------------------
create database scoped credential anmol_credential
with IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'


--external data source silver
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE silver_extsource
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://azuredwhextlake.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/',
    CREDENTIAL = anmol_credential
)

--external data source gold
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE gold_extsource
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://azuredwhextlake.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/',
    CREDENTIAL = anmol_credential
)

-- external file formats for silver
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT parquet_file_format
WITH
(  
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

-- external file formats for gold(delta)
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT delta_file_format
WITH
(  
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELTA
)
